title: teucrium polium subsp. mairei
intro: Teucrium polium subsp. mairei, also known as the Moroccan germander, is a subspecies of the Teucrium polium plant, a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Teucrium polium subsp. mairei has been found to possess medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Teucrium polium subsp. mairei can be obtained through infusions, decoctions, and infusions in the form of teas, tinctures, and essential oils.
